Why Great Brands Choose Us

What sets us apart is simple : unified SEO and AEO execution, real-time intelligence, and expert-led delivery at scale.

Talk to an Expert

Talk to an Expert

Passionfruit feels like an extension of our team! They are proactive, sharp, and deeply invested in outcomes. We look forward to each meeting with them!”

Passionfruit feels like an extension of our team! They are proactive, sharp, and deeply invested in outcomes. We look forward to each meeting with them!”

SEO. GEO. AEO. One Partner.

One unified strategy covering both Google and AI chatbots. A single implementation plan, one accountable owner, full transparency, and managed execution.

Data Backed Execution

Dashboards don’t move revenue. We combine our proprietary technology with in-house experts to deliver end-to-end execution. No reports you have to act on yourself.

Power AI Agents & Real-Time Insights

Our analytics agents process 100+ signals per URL and deliver insights in real time. Our experts always have the right data at the right moment to make the right decision.

Execution at Scale

No hourly billing traps. No low-quality AI content factory. AI handles large-scale data gathering and analysis, but every action is executed and reviewed by in-house experts.

Insights

Actions

Know your next best move

Passionfruit brings AEO plus SEO signals into one view so you can see what is working, what is slipping, and what matters next. Track AI share of voice, citations, and keyword level performance, then drill into the prompts, topics, and competitor sources shaping buyer decisions. When the data changes, you see it fast, and the next best action is already clear.

Dive into prompts, topics, and competitor domains tracking visibility on AI answers and Google results.

Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Your questions on SEO, GEO, and AI search answered by the team that's helped clients achieve 750% AI visibility growth

Your questions on SEO, GEO, and AI search answered by the team that's helped clients achieve 750% AI visibility growth

Talk to an Expert

What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?

GEO optimizes content to earn citations in AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Passionfruit's GEO strategies have delivered up to 750% visibility lifts.

How is AI changing the SEO industry?

Can SEO and GEO work together, or do they require separate strategies?

What is programmatic SEO, and how does it scale organic traffic?

How long does it take to see results from an SEO campaign?

What should I look for when hiring an SEO agency?

How do AI search engines decide which brands to recommend?

Is SEO still worth the investment with AI Overviews taking over Google?

What role does Reddit play in modern SEO and GEO strategy?

What's the difference between an AI-native SEO agency and a traditional one?
